summary: The diff implements most of the requirements. All 13 requirements (REQ-114 through REQ-126) appear to be addressed with corresponding file changes. However, a few specific acceptance criteria have gaps worth noting: REQ-116 specifically calls for a useGetProductByCategory hook, but the diff shows the ProductDetail page uses useGetProductsByCategory (plural, by category array) instead. REQ-123 requires useGetOrderById as a fallback for sessionStorage, but the OrderConfirmation page only uses sessionStorage without any fallback query call.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the useGetProductByCategory hook (singular) to pass the category slug as-is to actor.getProductByCategory
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows ProductDetail.tsx uses useGetProductsByCategory (plural, calling actor.getProductsByCategory), not a useGetProductByCategory hook calling actor.getProductByCategory. The REQ explicitly names useGetProductByCategory (singular) calling getProductByCategory on the backend.

missing_requirements.requirement: Order Confirmation page must retrieve order via useGetOrderById when sessionStorage is unavailable
missing_requirements.reason: The OrderConfirmation page only reads from sessionStorage and shows an Order Not Found error if not present. The requirement states it must also use useGetOrderById as a fallback, but no query hook call is present in the component.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin page includes a Product Catalog tab that allows seeding all 6 product categories into the backend via addProductDetail mutations
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states that no manual Admin page seeding action should be required (REQ-115 AC), and the non-goals state no new e-commerce features beyond restoring existing ones. A Product Catalog seeding tab was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Cart link added as a separate entry in the mobile menu navigation with its own ShoppingCart icon
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-124 requires a cart icon in the navigation header and explicitly states not to alter the mobile menu structure. Adding a separate Cart link entry to the mobile nav dropdown goes beyond restoring the cart icon without altering the mobile menu structure.
